message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame.head + tail (4 cases)

Append 4 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame head/tail row
windowing:

- head_default (n=5 over 8 rows)
- head_n_3 (string-indexed frame)
- head_larger_than_len (n=100 on a 3-row frame, returns the whole
  thing — verifies clamping)
- tail_default (n=5 over 8 rows)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which returns
expected_frame), runs the Rust DataFrame.head(n)/.tail(n), and
asserts parity via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameHead /
DataFrameTail were already wired through the Frame response branch;
this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-sslcc]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
